_purpose: Per-PC baseline af installed dependencies + tooling. Bruges til cross-PC parity-check (PC1 ↔ PC2). Refresh efter hver dep-bump eller hver `npm ci`. Compare-script: scripts/agent-doctor.ps1 (install-parity check, #618).
captured_via: AI-driven dep-sync forward-guard implementation (#618) — sync-deps verification run

git.head_subject: chore(ops): PC2 dep-sync snapshot + NOW.md session-H entry (Refs #616 #618)

parity_status.root: OK — all direct deps match lockfile
parity_status.backend: OK — all direct deps match lockfile
parity_status.frontend: OK — all direct deps match lockfile

remediation_history.2026-05-24T20:40+02:00: Pre-#618: drift-check rapporterede 11 missing root deps + 428 missing frontend deps + 1 root version-mismatch (lint-staged 17.0.2 vs lock 17.0.5). frontend/node_modules eksisterede som tom dir.
remediation_history.2026-05-24T20:41+02:00: npm run sync-deps (nyt script, dette PR): npm ci på root/backend/frontend — root +39 pakker, backend re-installed (324), frontend re-installed (442). All direct deps now match lockfile.

direct_dep_diffs.frontend.vite: NicolaiPC=8.0.14 vs EmmaPC=8.0.13 — EmmaPC snapshot var taget FØR sidste npm ci på PC2 (per remediation_history påstand om vite-bump); current lockfile = 8.0.14

tooling_diffs.node: NicolaiPC=v24.14.1 vs EmmaPC=v25.9.0 — PC1 er 1 major bagud, ikke blokkerende

known_lesson.frontend_node_modules_empty_dir_not_dete: PC1 havde tomt `frontend/node_modules/`-dir efter pull. `test -d frontend/node_modules` passerede (dir eksisterede) men der var 0 filer i den. Lesson: dir-existence er ikke tilstrækkelig — install-parity check skal verificere package-by-package mod `node_modules/<name>/package.json`.
known_lesson.npm_ci_dry_run_misleading_on_pc1: `npm ci --dry-run` rapporterede success+pakke-count men opdagede ikke at `frontend/node_modules/` var tomt. Konfirmerer PC2's observation om `npm install` lying — `npm ci --dry-run` har samme blind spot. Eneste pålidelige check: faktisk node_modules vs lockfile diff (det install-parity check gør).
